title: Designer for Canva Templates
brief: I am a mortgage lender in Northern California seeking a designer to create a professional, editable Canva template package for ongoing marketing. I want to hire someone who can build canva templates, edit videos into reels and shorts. Create branded content and graphics. Help position me as the mortgage expert in Solano County and Bay Area Primary project: • Open House Finance Flyer (front and back) • Fully editable in Canva • Designed for both print and digital use Future projects may include: • First-Time Buyer Flyers • VA Loan Flyers • Refinance Flyers • Home Equity Review Flyers • Realtor Co-Branded Marketing Pieces Design style: • Sophisticated • Luxury but approachable • Clean and modern • Black, white, and brass/gold accents • Designed to appeal to Bay Area homebuyers The template must allow easy editing of: • Property photos • Purchase price • Monthly payment scenarios • Down payment options • QR codes • Appreciation projections • Contact information
